2026-05-21.content:
When deploying your Secure Web Proxy instance as [next
hop](https://docs.cloud.google.com/secure-web-proxy/docs/deploy-next-hop), you can now configure the gateway
to listen on all ports (from `1` to `65535`). By using this feature, your proxy
can automatically intercept and enforce security policies and rules to all
outbound traffic, removing the need to manage specific port lists.

This feature is supported in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Secure Web Proxy listens on all ports
summary.summary: Secure Web Proxy now supports listening on all ports (1-65535) when deployed as a next hop. This allows for automatic interception and policy enforcement on all outbound traffic without managing specific port lists. This feature is currently in Preview.

summary.title: VPC Service Controls Now Generally Available
summary.summary: VPC Service Controls is now generally available. This feature enhances security by allowing you to define a security perimeter around your Google Cloud resources.
